titolo: La Soglia dell'Orizzonte e la Fiamma
contenuto:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 600" width="100%" height="100%" style="background:#060913;">
  <!-- Linee di griglia di fondo, accennate -->
  <g stroke="#161c2e" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.3">
    <line x1="100" y1="0" x2="100" y2="600" />
    <line x1="300" y1="0" x2="300" y2="600" />
    <line x1="500" y1="0" x2="500" y2="600" />
    <line x1="700" y1="0" x2="700" y2="600" />
    <line x1="0" y1="150" x2="800" y2="150" />
    <line x1="0" y1="300" x2="800" y2="300" />
    <line x1="0" y1="450" x2="800" y2="450" />
  </g>

  <!-- Montagna di Ghiaccio (Sullo Sfondo) -->
  <polygon points="150,500 450,180 650,500" fill="#d0e1f9" opacity="0.25" />
  <polygon points="250,500 450,180 350,500" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.15" />

  <!-- Montagna Minerale (Fronte) con luce dorata -->
  <polygon points="300,500 550,220 750,500" fill="#d9a05b" opacity="0.4" />
  <polygon points="550,220 750,500 580,500" fill="#2b1b0a" opacity="0.5" />

  <!-- La Silhouette scura in primo piano (L'osservatore) -->
  <path d="M 0,600 C 120,550 180,450 160,350 C 145,280 110,240 70,260 C 30,280 15,350 0,380 Z" fill="#12131a" opacity="0.85" />
  <circle cx="110" cy="280" r="45" fill="#12131a" opacity="0.85" />

  <!-- Linee di tensione del fuoco (Vettori rossi e arancioni che salgono) -->
  <path d="M 380,500 Q 420,380 390,260 T 430,120" fill="none" stroke="#ff4500" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.8" />
  <path d="M 400,500 Q 450,400 440,320 T 410,180" fill="none" stroke="#ff8c00" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M 360,500 Q 350,420 370,340 T 350,220" fill="none" stroke="#ff0000" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6" />

  <!-- Il nodo geometrico deformato (simbolo della transizione) -->
  <path d="M 200,480 Q 400,430 600,480 T 400,530 Z" fill="none" stroke="#1c1d24" stroke-width="4" stroke-dasharray="10,5" opacity="0.6" />
  <path d="M 210,485 Q 400,440 590,485 T 400,520 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d9a05b" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3" />

  <!-- Testo poetico impresso sullo sfondo -->
  <text x="30" y="50" fill="#ffffff" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" opacity="0.5">CUSTODIA DEL LIMITE</text>
  <text x="30" y="75" fill="#ffffff" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" opacity="0.35">Il tempo consuma lo stimolo, la memoria lo accoglie.</text>
</svg>
